title: EA to Release Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2022 Results on May 10, 2022
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) will release its financial results for the fiscal quarter and year ended March 31, 2022 after the close of market on Tuesday, May 10, 2022. In conjunction with this release, EA will host a conference call to review its financial results for the fiscal quarter, discuss its outlook for the future and may disclose other material developments affecting its business and/or financial performance.
